currentClaim: Proposal Review Workflow v1 已 accepted：Threadsmith 现在有 review-proposal 命令、isolated smoke 和 focused tests，用来把 external writeback proposal 转成 review artifact，同时保持 committed truth 不被自动修改。

doneWhenChecklist.label: 新增 Proposal Review Workflow v1 实施计划
新增 proposal review 命令，能输出 review artifact
accept-plan 保持人工采纳计划，不自动写 committed truth
accept-plan / reject / needs-recovery 路径有 focused tests
focused tests、project truth、diff hygiene 与 JSON 校验通过

knownGaps: 当前只做 adapter prompt freshness，不做真实 multi-provider 执行。
前端继续冻结；proposal review UI 暂不实现。
